Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to '提升其健康與競技體適能' (improve health and competitive physical fitness), directly supporting Target 3.4 on promoting well-being through physical activity.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education and develops physical skills, contributing to Target 4.3 (access to tertiary education) and Target 4.4 (relevant skills).

Gender Equality.reason: The course is specifically for 'female' students, which can be inferred as a measure to encourage women's full participation in sports, relating to Target 5.5.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By offering a 'female'-only class, the course may promote social inclusion for women in sports, which relates to Target 10.2 on inclusion irrespective of sex.
